title: 30天烧掉60万亿，扎克伯格没进250强：大型科技AI沦为KPI游戏
description: 亚马逊在其员工人工智能工具上安装了一个仪表。
titleZh: 30天烧掉60万亿，扎克伯格没进250强：大型科技AI沦为KPI游戏
titleEn: Burning 60 Trillion in 30 Days, Zuckerberg Didn’t Make the Top 250: Big Tech AI Reduced to a KPI Game
descriptionZh: 亚马逊在其员工人工智能工具上安装了一个仪表。
descriptionEn: Amazon installed a meter on its AI tool for employees. Officially, it’s not for evaluation, but managers keep an eye on the leaderboard. Meta’s internal ranking shows 60 trillion tokens burned in 30 days, and Zuckerberg didn’t even make the top 250. Yet Jellyfish data reveals the truth: a 10x increase in tokens only yields a 1x boost in output. Who is fueling this absurd game?
